meta.title: Limit wait action to 10 seconds
meta.body_summary: Cap the browser-use agent wait action at 10 seconds to prevent excessively long asyncio.sleep delays during automation.

perf_labels.notes: Small-scope wait cap fix; cubic flagged negative sleep risk and the follow-up commit adopted min(max(seconds,0),10); merged after CI agent task eval 2/3 with no benchmark.

change_scale_vs_repository.interpretation: At 79 changed lines, this is a small edit by absolute volume. It fits a small-step, fast-turnaround performance PR and is consistent with the successful, low-friction merge.

review_details.concern_detail: An inline review noted that negative seconds passed to asyncio.sleep would raise ValueError and recommended clamping the lower bound to 0; commit e655986 implemented min(max(seconds,0),10).
review_details.performance_claim: Prevent excessively long agent wait actions that block execution and accumulate delay.
review_details.antipattern_addressed: unbounded_blocking_wait (prior behavior; not in taxonomy enum)

capability_boundary.boundary_notes: A controller-level parameter clamp requires no benchmark or low-level runtime expertise; Cursor faces low merge friction on this class of small fix.

detection_detail.code_reading: cubic-dev-ai statically reviewed the wait implementation and suggested a clamp fix.
detection_detail.ci_auto: github-actions Agent Task Evaluation 2/3 pass; delve-auditor security scan reported no issues.

maintainer_practices.reproducibility_notes: No before/after timing data or benchmark; only CI end-to-end agent task pass rate and a narrative 10-second cap claim.
maintainer_practices.regression_detail: After review feedback, an additional commit fixed the negative bound within the same PR; no revert occurred.

core_change_summary.description: In browser_use/controller/service.py, the wait action now uses actual_seconds=min(max(seconds,0),10) before asyncio.sleep, with updated action description and logging.
core_change_summary.secondary_note: Merging main brought in multiple observe_debug(ignore_input=True, ignore_output=True) tweaks that may reduce tracing overhead but are not the stated focus of this PR.
change_trajectory: Initial commit (c0c1d86f): added min(seconds, 10) cap and cap logging.
Post-review (e655986b): adopted cubic suggestion to clamp lower bound via min(max(seconds, 0), 10).
dbb42221 was precommit formatting only; no semantic change.

review_signals.summary: Negative seconds passed to asyncio.sleep would raise ValueError; lower bound should be clamped to 0.
review_signals.action_taken: Maintainer adopted the suggestion in e655986b: actual_seconds = min(max(seconds, 0), 10).

review_signals.summary: Formal review body is only a link to cubic.dev; substantive feedback appears in the inline comment.
Security and compliance scan reported no issues.
Agent end-to-end task evaluation passed 2/3 (captcha_cloudflare failed; amazon_laptop and browser_use_pip passed).
review_signals.action_taken: Auto-merge proceeded despite incomplete task pass rate.

collaboration_trajectory: Inline cubic review appeared roughly 3 minutes after PR creation.
Maintainer added commits to fix the negative bound and ran precommit.
Auto-merge enabled and merged within ~13 minutes; no CHANGES_REQUESTED block.
